name: theme-factory
tagline: Applies one of 10 preset color/font themes, or a custom-generated one, to slides, docs, or landing pages after the user confirms a choice.
verdict: Low-risk, well-scoped styling skill: no network, exec, secrets, or install steps; compact SKILL.md defers bulk theme specs and a showcase PDF to separate files; steps are concrete and consistent. Weak spots: description states what it does but not explicit trigger phrasing, no NOT-for scope guidance, no handling if a theme file or the showcase PDF is.

highlights.summary: Description explains what the skill does (theme styling) but never phrases when to invoke it, e.g. no 'use when' cue.
No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope language anywhere in description or body.
No handling for a missing theme-showcase.pdf or missing themes/ file; only the 'no theme fits' case has a fallback.
